text:
Market today: Inflation data came in cooler than expected, which is the main driver for sentiment. Tech and chip names are what move your portfolio, so this is good news.

Your holdings: SOXL is a SELL signal, down 30.18%, and is a leveraged ETF that decays. SPAL is also a SELL signal, down 31.89%, and is a leveraged ETF that decays. PTNM is a NEW position, down 15.25%, and is a tiny spec.

Watch: Keep an eye on NVDA's scanner setup. It has a strong bias and is in a discount area.

Bottom line: Focus on managing your leveraged positions and watching for opportunities in strong names.
plays: Trim SOXL: It's a SELL signal and leveraged decay is a killer.
Trim SPAL: Also a SELL signal and leveraged decay is a concern.
Consider NVDA: Scanner setup is strong (BUY 205.12-204.45, stop 203.03) and it's in a discount.
